claimText: PSL-affiliated guidance notes that generative AI can undermine research reproducibility because its codes and algorithms may be unknown and change regularly, and because probabilistic generation can produce variable responses.

citation.citationTitle: Utiliser l'intelligence artificielle dans sa recherche : des recommandations pour le respect de l'intégrité scientifique
citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.
